data.content: Shipment complete: merged worktree-foolery-7e6d-terminal-rehydration to main via fast-forward (f0ec2a3400b2, 5dad96ce2488). CI green on origin/main. Fix removes early-return in useRehydrateTerminals so backend sessions are always fetched on rehydration, enabling cross-browser sync. Tests added: multi-context Playwright script and unit tests for terminal store/hooks.
